features.name: Skills Platform — Phase 4: Distribution, Structural Enforcement, and Non-Technical Access
features.healthReason: Branch-setup complete for p4-spike-a: worktree at .worktrees/p4-spike-a, branch feature/p4-spike-a, baseline 32 suites 0 failures

guardrails.label: Phase 4 enforcement architecture ADR — 3-operation shared contract for all surface adapters
guardrails.evidence: Spikes A, B1, B2 all PROCEED. ADR-013 written to .github/architecture-guardrails.md. Enforcement package (resolveAndVerifySkill, evaluateGateAndAdvance, writeVerifiedTrace) confirmed as shared contract for all surface adapters. P2/P4 PARTIAL for Mode 1 surfaces acknowledged; Mode 2 headless subprocess is the resolution path.

guardrails.label: context.yml is the single configuration source — no hardcoded values
Non-fork update channel — consumers must not fork
Human approval gate — no automated merge
Hash verification on sync — no force/skip bypass
One question at a time in all surfaces
No persistent hosted runtime
No credentials, tokens, or personal data in committed files
Fields written to pipeline-state.json must exist in schema

features.name: Skills Platform — Phase 3: Governance Hardening, T3M1 Close, and Enterprise Scale

metrics.name: T3M1 audit question coverage
metrics.target: 8/8 questions answered by independent non-engineer reviewer
metrics.baseline: 3/8 at Phase 2 close
metrics.evidence: Named independent reviewer on record: craigfo (PR #98, 2026-04-15). Full pipeline run completed autonomously. Formal MODEL-RISK.md 8/8 audit answers not yet documented — dependency for full on-track exists. Signal: partial — independent operator identified and pipeline-capable, formal audit artefact pending.

metrics.name: Assurance gate substantive signal (completedAt duration)
metrics.target: All post-Phase-3 production traces show completedAt >50ms after startedAt
metrics.baseline: 1–2ms (Phase 2 actuals, adversarial audit 2026-04-12)

metrics.name: Post-merge silent failure detection rate
metrics.target: Zero silent failures persisting beyond one CI cycle
metrics.baseline: 4 silent failures across Phase 2 (PRs #51, #52, #56)

metrics.name: Enterprise approval channel end-to-end
metrics.target: At least one complete DoR sign-off via Teams or Jira adapter
metrics.baseline: GitHub Issue adapter only — no enterprise channel exists

metrics.name: AGENTS.md adapter: non-GitHub inner loop validated
metrics.target: One complete story delivered end-to-end via real non-GitHub agent
metrics.baseline: Adapter delivered but validated against fixture mocks only (Phase 2)
metrics.evidence: Phase 3 evidence tier: docs/agent-compatibility-matrix.md produced covering 4 tools (GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Claude Code, Amazon Q Developer) with specific gap assessments. Full M5 target (live delivery run) deferred to Phase 4 under ASSUMPTION-04 gate. Phase 4 backlog story registered at workspace/phase4-backlog-agent-live-delivery-run.md.

metrics.name: Estimation calibration continuity (Phase 3 E1→E3)
metrics.target: Phase 3 E2 estimates within 25% of E3 actuals for ≥70% of stories
metrics.baseline: Phase 2 E3 actuals in workspace/estimation-norms.md

metrics.name: Outer loop self-sufficiency: zero blocking lookups
metrics.target: Zero blocking external lookups during Phase 3 outer loop stages
metrics.baseline: Zero blocking lookups during Phase 2 outer loop (established as baseline)
metrics.evidence: Independent operator craigfo submitted PR #98 (2026-04-15): ran full outer loop unassisted (discovery -> benefit-metric -> definition -> review -> test-plan -> DoR with contracts -> implementation plans -> DoD -> verification scripts) for feature 2026-04-15-productise-cli-and-sidecar. Delivered working CLI (TypeScript, ~15 source files, E2E tests) and a second discovery (2026-04-16-engine-consolidation). Zero blocking lookups from operator. First independent non-operator pipeline run on record.

metrics.name: Priority 1 hardening: reduction in governance check failures per story
metrics.target: Zero npm test failures on master after any Phase 3 story merge
metrics.baseline: Phase 2: non-zero post-merge governance failures (establishing Phase 3 baseline from first PR)

metrics.name: T3M1 independent validation on record
metrics.target: 8/8 MODEL-RISK.md audit questions answered by named independent reviewer with date and role on record
metrics.baseline: Not on record — prerequisite: Priority 2 trace-field stories must be DoD-complete first
metrics.evidence: Named independent reviewer on record: craigfo (PR #98, 2026-04-15). Full pipeline run completed autonomously. Formal MODEL-RISK.md 8/8 audit answers not yet documented — dependency for full on-track exists. Signal: partial — independent operator identified and pipeline-capable, formal audit artefact pending.

metrics.name: Phase 3 exit criterion: artefact coverage score ≥80%
metrics.target: Post-pipeline CHANGELOG coverage score ≥80% by Phase 3 close
metrics.baseline: 45% coverage at 2026-04-16 audit (9/20 post-pipeline item groups covered by a formal story)

metrics.name: Gate structural independence: agent cannot weaken its own gate
metrics.target: Gate scripts in separate repo, CI validates SHA-256 checksum before execution
metrics.baseline: Gate scripts in delivery repo — agent has write access (structural gap confirmed Phase 2)

epics.name: Windows CI Parity and Pipeline Evolution

guardrails.label: No user-supplied content in innerHTML without sanitisation
guardrails.evidence: No viz/DOM changes in any E1 story deliverables reviewed

guardrails.label: No credentials, tokens, or personal data in committed files
guardrails.evidence: All E1 stories specify read-only operations. p3.1a, p3.1b, p3.1c, p3.1d: read-only filesystem access only, no network calls. p3.1e: documentation only. No credentials or PII in any deliverable.

guardrails.label: Viz reads local JSON only — no external fetch calls
guardrails.evidence: No viz changes in any E1 story deliverables reviewed

guardrails.label: Gate logic reads evidence fields from pipeline-state.json (not stage alone)
guardrails.evidence: p3.1b Architecture Constraints cite ADR-002 — new gate checks must evaluate at least one evidence field per file, not merely assert file existence.

guardrails.label: Fields written to pipeline-state.json must exist in schema
guardrails.evidence: p3.1b Architecture Constraints cite ADR-003 — any new gate output fields (e.g. checksRun, failedChecks) must be added to pipeline-state.schema.json in the same commit.

guardrails.label: Fields read by viz from pipeline-state.json must exist in schema
guardrails.evidence: No new pipeline-state.json fields read by viz introduced in E1 stories reviewed

guardrails.label: pipeline-viz.html renders without build step, server, or network
guardrails.evidence: No viz changes in any E1 story deliverables reviewed

guardrails.label: No npm devDependencies in pipeline-viz.html runtime
guardrails.evidence: No viz changes in any E1 story deliverables reviewed

guardrails.label: Stage enum in schema updated when skill adds/removes stage
guardrails.evidence: No new pipeline stages added or removed in E1 stories reviewed

guardrails.label: Gate add/remove synced with SKILL.md criteria
guardrails.evidence: No new governance gates added or removed in E1 stories reviewed (p3.1b extends an existing gate, not a new gate)

guardrails.label: Interactive elements keyboard-accessible
guardrails.evidence: No viz/UI changes in any E1 story deliverables reviewed

guardrails.label: Colour not sole indicator of gate status (icons/labels present)
guardrails.evidence: No viz/UI changes in any E1 story deliverables reviewed

guardrails.label: Gates must use evidence fields, not stage-proxy
guardrails.evidence: p3.1b Architecture Constraints cite ADR-002 — assurance gate extension must evaluate at least one evidence field per file. Assessed in p3.1b-assurance-gate-substantive-checks-review-1.

guardrails.label: Schema-first: fields defined before use
guardrails.evidence: p3.1b Architecture Constraints cite ADR-003 — new gate output fields added to pipeline-state.schema.json in same commit. Assessed in p3.1b-assurance-gate-substantive-checks-review-1.

guardrails.label: DoR touch-point contract binding at pre-merge — no silent scope bundling
guardrails.evidence: p3.1c Architecture Constraints cite ADR-008 — anti-overfitting gate change applies only to proposals evaluated after merge; retroactive re-evaluation explicitly excluded. Assessed in p3.1c-test-suite-integrity-review-1.

guardrails.label: Evaluation and write-back workflows must be separate triggers with separate permission scopes
guardrails.evidence: p3.1a and p3.1d Architecture Constraints both cite ADR-009. p3.1a: check-trace-commit.js reads origin/traces (not local). p3.1d Option A: scheduled workflow must follow two-workflow CI audit pattern. Assessed in p3.1a-review-1 and p3.1d-review-1.

guardrails.label: CI audit records must be persisted to main post-merge, not to feature branches
guardrails.evidence: p3.1a and p3.1d Architecture Constraints both cite ADR-010. p3.1a reads from origin/traces (post-merge main). p3.1d Option A: scheduled workflow persists audit records to main post-merge. Assessed in p3.1a-review-1 and p3.1d-review-1.
